name: Tufte Data Viz
description_en: Create, review, or style charts, graphs, dashboards, and sparklines enforcing Tufte principles—data-ink ratio, direct labeling, range-frame axes—plus modern screen-first standards (accessibility, responsive, dark mode), across Recharts, ECharts, Chart.js, matplotlib, Plotly, seaborn, D3.js, and SVG.
description_zh: 在 Recharts、ECharts、Chart.js、matplotlib、Plotly、seaborn、D3.js 与 SVG 上创建、审阅或美化图表、仪表盘与迷你折线图,贯彻 Tufte 原则——数据墨水比、直接标注、range-frame 轴——并兼顾现代屏幕标准(无障碍、响应式、深色模式)。
long_en: Brings a consistent, evidence-based visualization standard to chart code rather than ad-hoc styling, working across the major charting libraries.
long_zh: 为图表代码引入一致、有据可循的可视化标准,而非临时调样式,并覆盖主流图表库。
sec_note_en: Read-only guidance that reviews and restyles your chart code (allowed tools: Read/Glob/Grep); your data is not sent anywhere.
sec_note_zh: 只读式指导,审阅并重塑你的图表代码(允许工具:Read/Glob/Grep);不会把你的数据外发。
